description: Run Desi the Design Reviewer on a page or component of the Ivy in Manila website.

Use the `Desi The Design Reviewer` agent to evaluate the following website design.

Paste the page name and the HTML/CSS below, or describe what you want reviewed:

**Page / Component**: [e.g., Homepage hero, Partnership card, Mobile nav, Newsletter section]

**Content to review**:
```html
[Paste your HTML or CSS here — or describe the component if you don't have code]
```

Desi will evaluate:
- Visual hierarchy and layout
- Color usage against the brand palette (Navy, Honey, Cream, Taupe)
- Typography and readability
- Button and CTA design
- Card and component consistency
- Image and media integration
- Responsive design
- Accessibility (WCAG)
- Brand alignment with the ministry mission
- Polish and micro-interactions

The output will include star ratings per dimension, specific improvement recommendations, quick wins, and top 3 priority fixes.
